name: Ryan Park
learned: Ryan Park is a software engineer who loves to solve problems. He is constantly looking for ways to improve existing systems.
currently: Ryan Park is working on a project to create a new mobile app. He is also reading up on the latest technologies to stay ahead of the curve.
lifestyle: Ryan Park goes to bed around 1am, awakes up around 9am, eats dinner around 5pm.
daily_req: wake up and complete the morning routine at 8:00 am
have breakfast from 9:00 am to 9:30 am
spend time reviewing project requirements and planning app features from 9:30 am to 11:30 am
dive into coding and development work from 11:30 am to 1:30 pm
take a lunch break and recharge from 1:30 pm to 2:30 pm
continue coding and work on app testing from 2:30 pm to 5:00 pm
spend time reading up on the latest technology trends from 6:00 pm to 7:00 pm
